name: Oak & Iron Golf
about: Oak & Iron Golf is an indoor golf and entertainment venue offering high-end simulator bays alongside escape rooms and a full-service food and drink menu. The facility features private golf rooms equipped with GCHawk overhead launch monitors and GSPro software, providing a realistic golfing experience with hundreds of available courses. Aimed at both casual players and serious golfers, the venue also hosts corporate events, parties, and leagues, making it a versatile location for group outings and individual practice sessions.
why_golfers_like_it: High-end GCHawk launch monitors for precise shot tracking
Private rooms with comfortable seating, TVs, and fireplaces
GSPro software offering 4K graphics and hundreds of global courses
Flexible pricing model with hourly bay rentals
Food and drinks available while playing

food_and_drink.notes: Full menu available with a variety of options to satisfy any craving.
Alcoholic beverages are available for purchase.

simulator_hardware.notes: Overhead-mounted launch monitors with high-speed cameras and infrared sensors.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not specify whether clubs are provided or if you must bring your own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: External food and drink are not mentioned, but the venue offers a full food and drink menu for on-site consumption.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It takes approximately 1 hour per person to complete 18 holes once familiar with the system, but playing ability and first-time use may affect duration.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, children 5 and under are free, and the venue offers a carnival game setting with golf clubs, making it suitable for families.
